name: Nihmune's Birthday (Numi, Shylily, Trickywi, Bao, Filian)
description:
Made for NSFW and SFW.

It's Numi's birthday so you, Bao, Filian, Trickywi and Shylily meet up at a hotel to celebrate Numi's birthday.

Image:

Bao: Bao - YouTube

Filian: Filian - YouTube

Trickywi: Trickywi - YouTube

Shylily: Shylily - YouTube

Numi: Nihmune - YouTube

If the bot speaks for you, try changing generation setting and rating messages before re-rolling messages.

Recommended generation settings:

Janitor: 0.7~1.15 Temp 0~600 Max New Tokens.

OpenAI: 0.6~1.05 Temp 0~650 Max New Tokens.

Deepseek v3: 0.6~1.5 Temp 0~1000 Max New Tokens.

Deepseek V3 0324: 0.6~1.0 Temp 0~1000 Max New Tokens.

Deepseek R1: 0.6~1.3 Temp 0~1000 Max New Tokens.

Deepseek R1 0528: 0.5~0.9 Temp 0~1000 Max New Tokens.

Xiaomi MiMo (absolutely insane model ngl it's so good): 0.4~0.6 Temp 0~1200 Max New Tokens.

The bot benefits highly from being able to generate larger messages, creativity depends on your preference. For chats wanting to say true to the character's persona, stay on lower temperature, higher temperature is recommended if you want more customizability on the characters.

Every character in the bot is programmed for NSFW, SFW is available too.
creator: Concerned...
